text:
Once upon a time in a cozy little cottage snug against the trees, there lived a cat named Whiskers. Whiskers had nine lives, no doubt about it! One afternoon, as he lounged by the warm fireplace, he heard a song coming from the kitchen.

Curiosity paw-first, he crept through the cabinets until he found a dish of raspberries. He ate until his belly hurt before wandering back outside again.

Just then, a robin sang a merry song beside his head. Whiskers tilted his head toward the bird. The robin danced gracefully.

Whiskers watched in wonder. Suddenly, he pranced after the bird on his hind legs and danced alongside it. They twirled high above the foliage. The villagers looked out their windows.

Laughter erupted from somewhere high above. It was Oliver the owl swooping down.

"What have ye been devouring?" he hooted.

"Oh just berries!" chuckled Whiskers.
